name: ETH Retest Hold De-Risk v1
thesis: ETH 4h break impulses in transition often work better after a retest-and-hold than on the initial expansion bar. The edge should come from delayed continuation entries with quick time-based de-risk if expansion fails to appear promptly.
edge_mechanism: retest hold continuation with time-based de-risking
invalidation_condition: Abort if retest logic still collapses into sparse no-trade grammar or fails to produce post-cost edge.

long: Time-based de-risk after 2 bars if unrealized gain < 0.3 * ATR_14
short: Time-based de-risk after 2 bars if unrealized gain < 0.3 * ATR_14
